videos.title: Hafjell Ski Marathon påmeldingspromo - Vinn Madshus Redline!
Hafjell Ski Marathon - Erling Jevne viser deg fjellet og løypen.
videos.description:
Denne ble filmet i slutten av januar 2013. -6 grader og sol.
Hafjell Ski marathon arrangeres for første gang søndag 17. februar 2013.

For mer informasjon se:
www.hafjellskimarathon.no

Kamera/edit: Roger Hjelmstadstuen
Musikk: J Sigsworth
https://soundcloud.com/northcoast

videos.title: 2012 Pre-Loppet - Highlights
videos.description: Around and around they go... the 2012 Pre-Loppet was held on the snowmaking loop at Theodore Wirth as Mother Nature had been unable to deliver the real stuff.  After five laps of the 2.5K course, the race came down to a photo finish between Andrew Tilman and Nathan Porath.  Hilary Patzer won the womens division.
